hosted_failure.failure: the selected nonce mutation assigned the nonce's existing value, so the fail-loud changed-body assertion rejected a no-op test case

remediation: nonce mutation toggles one byte and therefore differs from every target nonce constructed by this fuzz grammar
the exact 21-byte hosted counterexample is a named deterministic corpus seed
CI and nightly replay all nine exact seeds before their time-bounded campaign
time-bounded discovery runs on an ignored target-directory copy so generated units cannot alter the reviewed source corpus

counterexample.expected_after_fix: the resource body changes, its derived ResourceId changes, and binding against the stale partition rejects

results.command: replay the exact named hosted counterexample once
results.result: pass; target executed the fixed input without panic

results.command: replay the exact nine-entry role-bound-intrinsic corpus
results.result: pass; all 9 files loaded and 10 initialization runs completed without failure

results.command: 45-second seed-1 role_bound_intrinsic_v1 campaign over an ignored corpus copy
results.result: pass; 1,122,376 executions in 46 seconds; cov=414; ft=450; 24 new units; peak RSS=414 MiB; 0 failures

results.command: clean-archive hygiene, conformance, package, architecture, corpus, complexity, code-quality, and tooling gates
results.result: pass; 73 tooling tests; exact nine-entry corpus; 0 quality findings or advisories

non_claims: the failure and fix concern the assurance harness, not the production role-binding implementation
a 46-second fuzz campaign is PR-smoke evidence and does not prove exhaustive input coverage
the local pass remains subject to a clean hosted rerun at the published remediation revision
this record does not replace human Class C behavior and evidence review or authorize production promotion
